snippet.title: Bruce Broussard on Catalyzing Change Through Crisis
snippet.description:
Unprecedented speed, collaboration, efficiency and results, all driving innovation: this is what healthcare has accomplished in the last few years. But as we settle into a new status quo, there is a pervasive sentiment that our industry is reverting to inefficiency. Embracing the evolution of healthcare requires that we embrace methods born of crisis as long-term solutions and evolve business models to meet new consumer demands. The way forward is clear–a collaborative approach, catalyzed by interoperability.

Bruce Broussard (President & CEO, Humana) joins CareTalk for a special episode recorded in front of a live audience at the EMIDS Healthcare Summit 2022.


ABOUT CARETALK
CareTalk is a weekly podcast that provides an incisive, no B.S. view of the US healthcare industry. Join co-hosts John Driscoll (President U.S. Healthcare and EVP, Walgreens Boots Alliance) and David Williams (President, Health Business Group) as they debate the latest in US healthcare news, business and policy.

snippet.title: Goo Goo Dolls - Iris (Nejla) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Kids 2022
snippet.description:
Full episodes: https://url.joyn.de/tvk/description

The Voice Kids: Die 14-jährige Nejla nimmt Gesangsunterricht, stand aber noch nie auf einer Bühne. Bei "The Voice Kids" 2022 singt sie "Iris" von den Goo Goo Dolls und spielt dazu auf der Gitarre. Und dann gibt es auch noch eine Zugabe mit einem selbstgeschriebenen Song.

*Empfohlen ab 6 Jahren*

Community Award: Vote für Deine liebste Blind Audition!
► https://www.sat1.de/tv/the-voice-kids/community-award

► Kanal abonnieren! / Subscribe to "The Voice Kids:
https://bit.ly/3zdFNv9
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 

Bei "The Voice Kids" dürfen die jüngsten  Talente zeigen, was in ihnen steckt! Dabei zählt nur die Stimme: Denn während ihres Auftritts in den Blind Auditions sind die Coach-Sessel in Richtung des Publikums ausgerichtet, sodass die Coaches nicht sehen, wer auf der Bühne steht. Wenn sie ein Talent in ihr Team holen möchten, drücken sie auf den Buzzer und der Sänger oder die Sängerin ist eine Runde weiter. Falls mehrere Coaches buzzern, hat das Talent freie Wahl. 
Nach den Blind Auditions folgen die Battles, in denen die Talente gegeneinander antreten, um in die Sing-Offs zu kommen! Nur wer sich hier abermals durchsetzt, schafft es in die alles ersehnten Finals - und hier entscheidet sich letztendlich, welches Talent welchen Teams mit einer atemberaubenden Stimme überzeugen kann und "The Voice Kids" gewinnt!

snippet.title: Rams CB Jalen Ramsey Talks Tom Brady & Bucs, Aaron Donald & More with Rich Eisen | Full Interview

snippet.title: Aaron Neville — "Tell It Like It Is" -- A Timeless Soul Hit
snippet.description:
Watch and listen to “Tell It Like It Is” by Aaron Neville — a timeless soul classic and one of the most iconic vocal performances in R&B history.

🎤 About the song and this video:
Originally released in 1966, “Tell It Like It Is” became Aaron Neville’s breakthrough hit, known for its emotional honesty and unforgettable vocal delivery. This video is from 1989 Cinemax Session "The Neville Brothers: Tell It Like It Is."

🎶 About Aaron Neville:
Aaron Neville is one of the most distinctive voices in American music, blending soul, R&B, and gospel influences into a signature sound that has inspired generations.

💿 Why this song matters:
“Tell It Like It Is” remains a defining track of classic soul music, celebrated for its vulnerability, sincerity, and enduring appeal.

snippet.title: When will action be taken on the numerous accusations of racism among Everett leaders?
snippet.description:
In the days since The Boston Globe published details of a leaked recording of Everett City Councilor Anthony DiPierro and a spokeswomen for the city’s mayor joking about accusations of racism, nothing has been done to indicate such behavior is unacceptable. The report comes two months since we learned DiPierro shared a racist meme, referencing the n-word numerous times, and fourth months since Everett’s superintendent of schools accused the mayor of having a “racist agenda.” It’s also been nearly two years since former City Councilor Gerly Adrien started speaking out about the racism she endured in city politics.
Jim Braude questions why little to nothing has been done, and when someone will finally step up.

snippet.title: Aaron Rodgers Gets Dissed: Bruce Arians’ Comments About The MVP Race
snippet.description:
Whitlock blasts Buccaneers coach Bruce Arians for saying it would be a travesty if Tom Brady does not win NFL MVP this season. Why does the big man think the comment was a passive-aggressive dig at Aaron Rodgers? How does the COVID controversy play into his analysis? Why does “Fearless” regular Steve Kim not agree?

snippet.title: Jayson Tatum hates the notion that he and Jaylen Brown can't win a title | The Draymond Green Show
snippet.description:
Jayson Tatum explains to Draymond Green on ‘The Draymond Green Show’ why he’s always scoffed at the perception he can't coexist with Jaylen Brown and that the duo can't win a championship with the Boston Celtics. He references players like Devin Booker making the NBA Finals to note that narratives are only narratives until they get disproven.
